LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-24-2025 RE: DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY IS DENIED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT301TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)
